description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.22.0 Bus
• Bus page loads much faster — Previously, opening "Get on bus/Return home" downloaded and parsed over 3 MB of HTML each time. Now data is in a separate file, reducing the initial HTML to just a few KB. From the second time onward, it loads instantly from your device's cache.
• URL structure cleaned up: /@hanno/dekakeru/ → /@hanno/bus/out/, /@hanno/kaeru/ → /@hanno/bus/in/ (nested under bus features)
• Smooth fade-in transition between screens — When switching from setup → direction selection → timetable → countdown, screens fade in gently from below
• Link prefetch enabled across all screens, reducing network wait time the moment you tap

v1.22.0 Favorite Shops
• Tap anywhere on a shop card to view details — Previously only a small shop name link worked, which was confusing
• Cards now show visual feedback on tap (a subtle outline flash)

v1.22.0 Tap Interaction
• All buttons and links across the app flash with tap feedback — On mobile, even if your finger covers the button, the outline + subtle shrink gives clear "pressed" visual feedback. Scrolling does not trigger this, so no false positives.
• iOS's default highlight (faint color) is disabled and replaced with this unified feedback

v1.22.0 Garbage
• Garbage section open/closed state persists when navigating between pages — Home → Garbage Collection Calendar → Back stays closed (closes only when you close the tab)

v1.21.0 Garbage
• Residence management changed from "Course" to "Town name" — Preparing the system for future municipal partnerships (town-level notifications, etc.). Please select your town name again
• Course dropdown removed; consolidated to single town name selection button
• After selection, displays as "○○-cho (A-1 Haraichiba/Naguri) [Change]" with both town name and course
• Garbage Collection Calendar (all courses) and Item Search links gathered in the garbage section

v1.21.0 Weather
• Past-date weather rows now closed by default — Hides information you usually don't need. Data loads on demand when opened, saving bandwidth

v1.21.0 Bus
• Direction selection screen for "Get on bus" no longer shows "X hours later" when viewing other dates — Matches "Return home" behavior (time display and remaining buses still shown)

v1.21.0 Home Page Reorganization
• "Services" consolidated into one section — α/β labels removed; reordered as Bus → Favorite Shops → AED → Restroom
• New "Calendar" section added before footer — Event calendar subscriptions and personal calendar links (iCal) gathered here
• Favorite Shops / Favorite Friends buttons always visible (visible even when logged out; Google login offered at destination)
• Large login prompt panel removed; footer now shows "Sign in with Google" / logged-in name + logout in one line

v1.21.0 Other
• Footer version display now uses ISO-style date format (2026-05-21 11:45 JST) and improved readability
